series_metadata.series_description: Record series contains correspondence (emails & memos), REALPRO screen shots relative to provider & private investigator and security guard registrations, statistical reports & additional material(s) related to the PISG Unit move from the Department of Commerce to the office of Homeland Security to Revenue Mgnt. & database conversion from REALPRO to ALRS.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for five years from date of unit transfer, then destroy., Paper: Shred
